name: Shrimp Noodles
instructions:
1. Soak rice noodles in warm water for 5 minutes, then drain. If using dried shrimp, rinse them.

2. Heat sesame oil and vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.

3. Add shrimp and season with a pinch of salt. Cook for 2-3 minutes until pink and opaque. Remove from skillet and set aside.

4. In the same skillet, add sliced bell pepper. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until crisp-tender.

5. Add drained rice noodles and soy sauce to the skillet. Toss everything together for 1-2 minutes until noodles are heated through.

6. Add the cooked shrimp back to the skillet. Toss gently to combine.

7. Transfer to bowls and garnish with sliced scallion. Serve immediately.
simpleInstructions:
1. Soak rice noodles in warm water 5 minutes, drain.

2. Heat oil, cook garlic 30 seconds. Add shrimp, cook 2-3 minutes until pink. Set aside.

3. In same pan, cook bell pepper 1-2 minutes. Add noodles and soy sauce, toss 1-2 minutes.

4. Add shrimp back in, toss. Garnish with scallion. Serve.
